description_long: This is a compact, lightweight tripod with three telescopic legs, each featuring two flip-lock segments for adjustable height. The tripod head is a pan-tilt type, equipped with two ergonomic handles for precise positioning and control. The top of the tripod features a mounting platform, likely with a quick-release plate for easy attachment and removal of cameras or other equipment. The main body and legs are constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, with rubberized feet for stability on various surfaces. The tripod is predominantly gray with darker accents on the head, handles, and leg locks, and a visible red circular logo on the head. The overall design is practical and portable, suitable for photography or videography in urban environments.
description: A compact, gray tripod with telescopic legs, flip-locks, and a pan-tilt head with ergonomic handles. Features a quick-release plate and a red logo on the head.
description_view_0: This view highlights the tripod's pan-tilt head, one extended handle, and the front two legs with visible flip-locks and the red logo.
description_view_1: This angle shows both ergonomic handles, the mounting platform, and the tripod's three legs with their flip-lock mechanisms.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the side profile of the pan-tilt head, the quick-release plate, and the arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: This rear view displays the back of the tripod head, both handles, and the alignment of all three legs.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Red circular logo with white emblem
